overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from the video game Fort Solis, showing a character in a sci-fi space station facility. The character moves from a dimly lit private office through a narrow corridor into a medical bay with distinctive red emergency lighting and a large display screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit private office with computer workstation

events.description: character stands up from desk chair and turns toward the door

agents.ego_description: sitting at desk viewing the Fort Solis logo on screen, then standing up and preparing to leave

entered.detail: monitor displaying TETRA and FORT SOLIS logo in white text
cluttered desk with papers, white mug, and green apple
shelf with red and white binders visible to the right of the desk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit office where the character is seated at a workstation. The computer screen displays the Fort Solis logo. The character stands up from the chair, leaving the desk with its mug, papers, and green apple behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to medical bay entrance

events.description: character reaches the medical door and opens it to enter the next room

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor toward the medical bay door

entered.detail: smooth wall surface of the corridor
poster or notice on the left wall
door with MEDICAL signage and green tinted glass panel

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit corridor away from the office. A poster is visible on the left wall as the character approaches a door marked MEDICAL at the end of the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay lounge with circular seating and large display

events.description: entering room illuminated by red emergency lighting, significantly brighter than the corridor
character approaches the large wall screen displaying NO SIGNAL message

agents.ego_description: entering the medical bay and walking toward the large display screen at the far end

entered.detail: large wall-mounted screen displaying NO SIGNAL and Fort Solis interface graphics
curved white seating arrangement in the center of the room
cylindrical white medical station or cryogenic pod
red illuminated emergency lighting panels on the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious medical bay bathed in red emergency lighting. The room features a circular white sofa and a cylindrical medical pod. The character walks toward a large wall screen displaying a NO SIGNAL message and Fort Solis interface data.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet intimacy of a private office into the sterile, alarm-lit atmosphere of a medical facility. It begins with the character rising from a workstation featuring a green apple and the Fort Solis logo, leaving the dimly lit office behind. As the character moves forward, the space narrows into a dim corridor where a wall poster passes by on the left before the camera approaches a door marked MEDICAL. The scene then opens into a spacious medical bay bathed in red emergency lighting, shifting the mood from muted shadows to a high-alert environment. Finally, the camera glides past a circular white sofa and a cylindrical medical pod toward a large wall screen displaying a NO SIGNAL message.
